m	Z	m

parenthesizec
	FixFilterTaV
    filter_lambda=power<
        'filter'
        trailer<
            '('
            arglist<
                lambdef< 'lambda'
                         (fp=NAME | vfpdef< '(' fp=NAME ')'> ) ':' xp=any
                >
                ','
                it=any
            >
            ')'
        >
        [extra_trailers=trailer*]
    >
    |
    power<
        'filter'
        trailer< '(' arglist< none='None' ',' seq=any > ')' >
        [extra_trailers=trailer*]
    >
    |
    power<
        'filter'
        args=trailer< '(' [any] ')' >
        [extra_trailers=trailer*]
    >
    z
future_builtins.filterc
